task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of what I found and the plan I've designed:

## Plan: Custom Theme System

### Findings from codebase exploration

- **Existing `useTheme.ts`** already handles light/dark/system via `useSyncExternalStore` — the new hook follows this exact pattern
- **CSS system**: Tailwind v4 + CSS custom properties on `:root`, dark mode via `.dark` class on `documentElement` — the theme system overrides these via `element.style.setProperty()`
- **`packages/shared`**: ESM subpath exports pointing directly to `.ts` source files (no build step needed)
- **Settings page**: Already has an Appearance section with light/dark/system radio buttons — we replace this UI with `ThemeSelector`

### 7 files to create/modify

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `packages/shared/src/themes.ts` | **New** — `Theme` + `ThemeColors` types, 3 built-in themes, `getTheme()`, `listThemes()` |
| `packages/shared/package.json` | **Modify** — add `./themes` subpath export |
| `apps/web/src/hooks/useColorTheme.ts` | **New** — `useSyncExternalStore` hook, localStorage key `t3code:color-theme`, applies CSS vars + dark class, FOUC prevention on module load |
| `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` | **New** — row of theme cards with 3 color swatches each, matches existing settings radio-button style |
| `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` | **Modify** — replace the light/dark/system radio group with `<ThemeSelector />` |
| `apps/web/src/index.css` | **Modify** — add 4 new CSS property fallbacks (`--sidebar-background`, etc.) |
| `apps/web/src/main.tsx` | **Modify** — side-effect import of `useColorTheme.ts` for early FOUC prevention |

### Design decisions
- **t3-dark/t3-light** use colors matching the existing palette; **t3-midnight** introduces a deep navy scheme
- The new hook owns the `.dark` class and CSS overrides; existing `useTheme.ts` is left untouched
- Theme values use absolute colors (no CSS `var()` references) so the `themes.ts` module stays pure and server-safe
- The hook also sets 4 new semantic CSS vars (`--sidebar-background`, `--editor-background`, `--terminal-background`, `--status-bar-background`) for future component use
